title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Wow! They're all so cute! And there's so many of
them! You're incredible!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Trainer, you really did your best for me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy I could fly to the moon!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll pretend each and every one of them is you and
hug them really tight every day!
